allergies: ALL tree nuts EXCEPT pistachio and chestnut (both safe)
finned fish (salmon, tuna, cod, etc.) AND fish oil — including supplements/softgels and fish-oil-fortified products (some milks, juices, 'omega-3' foods). Shellfish IS safe

legumes: beans, peas, chickpeas, lentils — EXCEPT whole soy (tofu, edamame), which is safe. Watch for hidden pea protein / chickpea flour / lentil flour in protein powders, bars, pastas, and 'high-protein' products
bell peppers — SPECIFICALLY bell peppers: jalapeños, chilis, cayenne, paprika, hot sauce, and salsa are all safe
avoid: soy protein isolate/concentrate (common in protein powders and bars) — questionable, not confirmed; whole soy like tofu and edamame is fine
diet.note: Everything in allergies is a medical allergy: when curating foods.json or suggesting any food, check 'may contain' / shared-facility warnings for ALL allergy entries — not just ingredient lists. Pea protein is the biggest hidden risk in fitness foods. The avoid list is ingredient-level only.

goals.notes: the destination — lean bulk is the vehicle. Adam's bet: 6 months. Pace: e1RM 204 by Aug 25, 210 by Oct 1, 215 by Nov 1, 219 by Dec 1, 223 by Jan 1. The risk window is Oct-Dec (historical layoff season).
instrumental to bench-225; keep lean (~0.5 lb/wk)
